query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A small white dog captured mid-leap against a solid black background, with all four legs extended in a running or jumping pose, the animal's body angled diagonally across the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A small white dog captured in motion against a pitch-black void, heavily blurred from movement during exposure so that its limbs and features smear into soft streaks, rendered with minimal fine detail and mushy texture, in harshly crushed black-and-white tones where the subject nearly dissolves into abstract streaks of light against impenetrable shadow.
